title: 3.28.0 Hotfix 13
full_text:
3.28.0 Hotfix 13
3.28.0 Hotfix 13
Fixed a bug where the Map Stash Affinity was taking priority over the Blight and Delirium Affinities.
Fixed Memory Thread currency not dropping from Memory Tears in Maps after completing the quest versions of all 3 Incarnation bosses.
Fixed Saresh, of the Weeping Black using his tracking beam ability against targets in melee range which it can't reach.
Fixed several cases where Rogue Exile replacements in Mirages were doing far more damage than intended.
Fixed an issue where several new scarabs were not present on the currency exchange outside of standard leagues.
Fixed a rare case where a hive breach could fail to spawn waves.
Fixed a bug where Raised spiders from Arakaali's fang don't deal damage when they persist through area transitions.
Fixed a bug where Raised spiders from Arakaali's fang would never update their stats if your minion stats changed.
Fixed interaction with Settlers Hourglass while using a controller.
Soul of Lunaris' 6% reduced Elemental Damage taken if you have been Hit Recently has been changed from Iceberg Map to instead be Beach Map. Captured Soul of Otesha, the Giantslayer has been renamed to Captured Soul of Glace.
Fixed 2 client crashes.
Fixed 2 instance crashes.
This patch has been deployed without restarting the servers. You will need to update your client to receive the client changes in this patch.
Last edited by Natalia_GGG#0000 on Mar 10, 2026, 6:25:47 AM
